{{Infobox character
| name = One-Thirteen
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[One-Thirteen]] is a servant of the [[Arelius family]].}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[One-Thirteen]] is an [[Arelius]] servant.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
